chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 6998 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ Hearing of Case. 1. For hearing of CMA No. 30482/21 (stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 23.02.2026 None present. ---------- No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. A perusal of the Order Sheet reflects that a question of maintainability was framed on the first date. After which no initiative has taken to proceed with the matter. Under such circumstances, it appears that the Petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the Petition, which stands dismissed accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz
